Welcome to jwnhy’s Blog

Who am I?

Well, the title should be self-explanatory.

Anyways, I am jwnhy, Here is my resume.

What interests me?

  • C00l stuff
  • Reverse engineering
  • System programming
  • Programming language

What have I done?

  • A Kernel Debugger called Raven
  • An Exciting Attack abusing USB-C
  • A Memory Management Scheme on RISC-V
  • A Video to ASCII Player

and some other community works.
